description: Verified routes — real data from OpenFlights + airline schedules. Aircraft from fleet databases.
source: OpenFlights, planespotters.net, Google Flights, FR24, airline official schedules

PEK-JFK.note: 国航旗舰航线，波音747-8执飞

SIN-JFK.note: 世界最长航线之一，A350-900ULR执飞 (18,000km/9,700nmi)

JFK-SIN.note: A350-900ULR执飞，全球最长商业航线之一

HND-LAX.note: 跨国际日期变更线，同日到达

SYD-LHR.note: 经停SIN，但这里按直飞展示

NRT-LAX.note: 新航东京-洛杉矶第五航权
